## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss ongoing content strategy, new work streams, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/xgyj-gL-5U-7yyACSHdaC658wgM-wMsj?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance hit new highs with 325 articles published, increased clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/xgyj-gL-5U-7yyACSHdaC658wgM-wMsj?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [New work streams introduced: Thought Leadership and positioning/messaging improvements](https://fathom.video/share/xgyj-gL-5U-7yyACSHdaC658wgM-wMsj?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Website redesign planned to break out content into use case and industry sections](https://fathom.video/share/xgyj-gL-5U-7yyACSHdaC658wgM-wMsj?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Considering WonderUp.io for website design and development ($5k/mo, unlimited requests, 2 at a time)](https://fathom.video/share/xgyj-gL-5U-7yyACSHdaC658wgM-wMsj?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
